## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the launch of the AI-led Growth community platform](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aim to launch the community platform next week, with initial focus on recruiting 5-10 high-profile "founding members" this week](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Restructure community content into clear buckets: Growth Toolkit (bite-sized content), Courses, and Discussions](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Implement a tiered membership model with free and paid access to drive engagement](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Develop compelling pitch and benefits for founding members to contribute meaningfully](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Create promotional assets (landing page, video) highlighting exclusive member list and community value](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)

## Topics

### Community Platform Structure

  - [Reorganize content into clearer buckets:](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Growth Toolkit: Bite-sized content like teardowns](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Courses: Longer-form educational content](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [Discussions: Ongoing conversation threads](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Implement tiered access:](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [Free tier with limited content visibility](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [Paid tier with full access](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Improve navigation and user experience:](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [Consider changing default landing page from "Feed" to curated content overview](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Add "Start Here" and "Say Hello" sections to boost initial engagement](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Leverage existing workshop/course content to drive discussions](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Create permanent, topic-centered discussion threads vs. short-lived conversations](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Develop a job board to attract active community participants](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Produce high-quality video content for landing page and promotional materials](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)

### Founding Member Strategy

  - [Target 10-20 high-profile founding members for initial launch](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Develop clear value proposition and expectations for founding members:](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
      - [Co-host an event](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
      - [Produce a piece of content (podcast, webinar, course)](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2597.0)
      - [Evangelize the community](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Create a one-pager highlighting exclusive member list and community benefits](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2749.0)
  - [Plan coordinated social media push with founding members upon launch](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)

### Social Media & Promotion

  - [Primary posting strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
      - [Post on Jason's personal account](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
      - [Repost (after 5-10 min delay) on AILedGrowth and GrowthX accounts](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Aim for multiple weekly posts (no set limit) as content allows](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Mix of serious, value-driven content with occasional memes/humor](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
  - [Coordinate team to engage immediately on posts for algorithm boost](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
  - [Develop landing page and promotional video highlighting community value and exclusive member list](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)

### Launch Timeline

  - [This week: Recruit initial 5-10 high-profile founding members](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
  - [Clean up and optimize community platform structure](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Create promotional assets (landing page, one-pager, video)](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)
  - [Next week: Target full launch with 10-20 founding members and coordinated social push](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Will: Begin formatting and structuring content in Circle platform; aim for initial review version by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2790.0)
  - [Claudia: Add events to the community platform](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2812.0)
  - [Jason: Start developing one-pager for founding member outreach](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2777.0)
  - [Team: Brainstorm compelling founding member pitch and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Develop promotional assets (landing page, video) highlighting community value](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [Plan coordinated outreach to potential founding members](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Set up Understory email campaigns to drive community signups](https://fathom.video/share/anramzpAUxyoTGxXRhNruEL-VkyBLL61?tab=summary&timestamp=2820.0)
